source_rationale: CD69 is an early activation marker on T cells and NK cells, indicating activated lymphocytes
KLRB1 (CD161) is a marker of NK cells and NKT cells, consistent with innate lymphoid identity
CCL5 (RANTES) is highly expressed by effector T cells and NK cells
Granzyme B is a cytotoxic effector molecule characteristic of NK cells and cytotoxic T lymphocytes
IL7R (CD127) marks memory T cells and innate lymphoid cells
Interferon-gamma is a hallmark cytokine of activated T cells and NK cells
PTPRC (CD45) is a pan-leukocyte marker confirming immune cell identity
IL32 is preferentially expressed by activated T cells and NK cells
Alpha-crystallin A is a lens-specific protein marking lens epithelial/fiber cells
Beta-crystallin B2 is a major structural protein of the ocular lens
Gamma-crystallin S is expressed in lens fiber cells
FOXE3 is a transcription factor essential for lens development and maintenance
HES5 is a Notch target gene involved in progenitor maintenance in the lens/eye
PROX1 is a transcription factor critical for lens fiber cell differentiation
Aquaporin 1 is expressed in lens epithelial cells for water transport
CD74 (invariant chain) is highly expressed on B cells and antigen-presenting cells
MS4A1 (CD20) is a definitive B cell marker
CD79A is a component of the B cell receptor complex, a canonical B cell marker
MHC class II expression is characteristic of B cells and antigen-presenting cells
Immunoglobulin J chain is expressed in B cells transitioning to antibody-secreting cells
LINC00926 is a B cell-specific long non-coding RNA
Keratin 3 is a cornea-specific cytokeratin marking corneal epithelial cells
Keratin 12 is specifically expressed in corneal epithelial cells
Claudin 4 is a tight junction protein in differentiated epithelial cells
Claudin 7 is expressed in differentiated epithelial cells
ELF3 is an epithelial-specific transcription factor important in corneal epithelium
MAL is a marker of differentiated corneal epithelial cells
Decorin is a proteoglycan highly expressed by corneal/stromal fibroblasts (keratocytes)
Fibulin-1 is an extracellular matrix protein produced by fibroblasts
SFRP4 is expressed by stromal fibroblasts and involved in Wnt signaling modulation
IGFBP5 is highly expressed in fibroblasts/stromal cells
Complement C1r is produced by fibroblasts and marks stromal cell identity
Complement C1s is co-expressed with C1R in stromal fibroblasts
Apolipoprotein D is a marker of quiescent fibroblasts
Matrix Gla protein is expressed by stromal/mesenchymal cells
Parvalbumin is a calcium-binding protein marking specific retinal ganglion cell subtypes
ONECUT2 is a transcription factor expressed in horizontal cells and specific retinal neurons
Calbindin marks horizontal cells in the retina
Glutamate receptor AMPA type subunit 4 is expressed in retinal horizontal cells
NDRG4 is expressed in neurons including retinal horizontal cells
Contactin-associated protein 2 is a neuronal adhesion molecule in retinal neurons
PROX1 is a transcription factor marking horizontal cells in the retina
MEG3 is a long non-coding RNA associated with cell cycle regulation and stress response
FOSB is an immediate early gene indicating recent transcriptional activation
CDKN1A (p21) is a cell cycle inhibitor marking quiescent or stressed cells
COX-2 is an inflammation-associated enzyme upregulated in stress responses
PPP1R15A (GADD34) is a stress-response gene induced by ER stress and DNA damage
NFKBIZ is an NF-kB pathway regulator involved in inflammatory signaling
TIMP3 is expressed by stromal cells and involved in extracellular matrix regulation
Dopachrome tautomerase is a melanogenic enzyme specific to melanocytes
PMEL (gp100) is a melanosome structural protein and definitive melanocyte marker
Tyrosinase-related protein 1 is a melanogenic enzyme specific to melanocytes
MLANA (Melan-A) is a melanocyte differentiation antigen and canonical marker
MITF is the master transcription factor for melanocyte lineage specification
TRPM1 is a melanocyte-specific ion channel regulated by MITF
Endothelin receptor B is critical for melanocyte development and survival
IGFBP5 is highly expressed in stromal fibroblasts
Decorin is a hallmark proteoglycan of corneal keratocytes/stromal fibroblasts
Matrix Gla protein marks mesenchymal/stromal cells
MMP2 is a matrix metalloproteinase produced by fibroblasts for ECM remodeling
ANGPTL7 is expressed in corneal stroma and trabecular meshwork cells
IL33 is expressed by stromal cells and fibroblasts as an alarmin
Microfibril-associated protein 4 is an ECM component produced by fibroblasts
CCL3 (MIP-1α) is a chemokine highly expressed by activated macrophages
C1QA is a complement component characteristic of tissue-resident macrophages
IL-1β is a pro-inflammatory cytokine produced by activated macrophages
MHC class II is highly expressed on macrophages as antigen-presenting cells
SPP1 (osteopontin) marks SPP1+ macrophages, a specific macrophage subset
RNASE1 is expressed by tissue-resident macrophages
CCL4 (MIP-1β) is a chemokine produced by activated macrophages
MHC class II is highly expressed on dendritic cells and macrophages
S100A8 (calgranulin A) is a marker of myeloid cells, especially monocytes and neutrophils
S100A9 (calgranulin B) forms a heterodimer with S100A8, marking inflammatory myeloid cells
MHC class II DP alpha chain is highly expressed on dendritic cells
MHC class II DP beta chain marks professional antigen-presenting cells
GPR183 (EBI2) is expressed on dendritic cells and guides their migration
CCL3 is a chemokine produced by activated myeloid/dendritic cells
GAD1 (glutamic acid decarboxylase) is the key enzyme for GABA synthesis, marking GABAergic amacrine cells
PAX6 is a master transcription factor for eye development, expressed in retinal amacrine cells
TFAP2B is a transcription factor marking GABAergic amacrine cells in the retina
TFAP2A is a transcription factor required for amacrine cell specification
Secretogranin II is a neuropeptide precursor expressed in neuroendocrine/amacrine cells
CART prepropeptide marks specific subtypes of amacrine cells in the retina
Glutamate receptor AMPA subunit 2 is expressed in retinal interneurons
CELF4 is a neuronal RNA-binding protein expressed in retinal neurons
Transferrin is a major secreted protein of retinal Müller glia
Clusterin is highly expressed in Müller glial cells of the retina
Glutamine synthetase is the canonical marker of retinal Müller glia
Glutathione peroxidase 3 is expressed in Müller glia for oxidative stress protection
HES1 is a Notch target gene maintaining Müller glial identity
Vimentin is an intermediate filament protein characteristic of Müller glia
Cellular retinoic acid binding protein 1 is involved in retinoid metabolism in Müller glia
FRZB (sFRP3) is a Wnt antagonist expressed by Müller glia
Kainate glutamate receptor subunit 1 is expressed in specific retinal bipolar/amacrine cells
AMPA receptor subunit 2 marks glutamatergic retinal neurons
CADPS is involved in dense-core vesicle exocytosis in neurons
PCP4 (Purkinje cell protein 4) is expressed in retinal neurons
NEUROD4 is a bHLH transcription factor involved in retinal neuron differentiation
Protein kinase C beta marks specific retinal bipolar cell subtypes
GSG1 is expressed in retinal neurons including amacrine/ganglion cells
Metabotropic glutamate receptor 6 is the canonical marker of ON-bipolar cells in the retina
PCP2 is a G-protein modulator specifically expressed in retinal ON-bipolar cells
G-protein gamma 13 subunit is expressed in ON-bipolar cells
TRPM1 is the transduction channel in ON-bipolar cells essential for light responses
VSX1 is a homeobox transcription factor marking specific bipolar cell subtypes
Hippocalcin is a calcium sensor expressed in retinal bipolar cells
CaMKII beta is expressed in retinal bipolar cells for calcium signaling
Dopachrome tautomerase marks melanocyte-lineage cells including iris/ciliary body pigmented epithelium
PAX6 is a master eye development transcription factor expressed in ciliary body epithelium
TRPM3 is an ion channel expressed in ciliary body/iris pigmented epithelium
DAPL1 is expressed in retinal pigment epithelium and related pigmented cells
Alpha smooth muscle actin marks ciliary muscle/iris smooth muscle cells
Smooth muscle myosin heavy chain marks ciliary/iris smooth muscle
MEIS2 is a transcription factor expressed in iris/ciliary body
TFPI2 is expressed in retinal pigment epithelium (RPE)
Dopachrome tautomerase is a melanogenic enzyme in RPE cells
FRZB is a Wnt antagonist expressed in RPE and ciliary epithelium
DAPL1 is a marker of retinal pigment epithelium
Keratin 18 is an epithelial marker expressed in RPE cells
TRPM3 is expressed in RPE and ciliary body epithelium
WNT2B is expressed in ciliary margin/RPE progenitor zone
Clusterin is expressed in RPE cells for cytoprotection
Gamma-synuclein is a marker of retinal ganglion cells
Neurofilament medium chain marks retinal ganglion cells with long axons
Stathmin 2 is a neuronal marker highly expressed in retinal ganglion cells
Parvalbumin marks specific retinal ganglion cell subtypes
NDRG4 is expressed in retinal ganglion cells
UCHL1 (PGP9.5) is a pan-neuronal marker enriched in retinal ganglion cells
MAP1A is a microtubule-associated protein in neurons with long axonal projections
RGS5 is a canonical marker of pericytes and vascular mural cells
PLAC9 is expressed in pericytes and perivascular cells
Thymosin beta-4 is highly expressed in pericytes and involved in vascular remodeling
Ubiquinol-cytochrome c reductase subunit indicates high mitochondrial activity in pericytes
PCP2 is the definitive marker of retinal ON-bipolar cells
ISL1 is a transcription factor marking bipolar cells in the retina
Metabotropic glutamate receptor 6 is essential for ON-bipolar cell signaling
TRPM1 is the ON-bipolar cell transduction channel
G-protein gamma 13 is part of the ON-bipolar cell signaling cascade
Protein kinase C alpha is a canonical marker of rod bipolar cells
CCDC136 is expressed in retinal bipolar cells
Rhodopsin is the visual pigment and definitive marker of rod photoreceptors
NRL is the master transcription factor for rod photoreceptor fate determination
Rod transducin alpha is essential for rod phototransduction
Rod phosphodiesterase alpha subunit is specific to rod phototransduction
Rod cyclic nucleotide-gated channel alpha is specific to rod photoreceptors
S-antigen (arrestin) is involved in rod phototransduction shutoff
Recoverin is a calcium-binding protein in photoreceptors
RP1 is a photoreceptor-specific microtubule protein in outer segments
Proteolipid protein 1 is the major myelin protein marking Schwann cells/oligodendrocytes
Myelin protein zero is specific to myelinating Schwann cells
S100B is a marker of Schwann cells and glial cells
ERBB3 is a neuregulin receptor essential for Schwann cell development
Cadherin 19 is specifically expressed in Schwann cells
LGI4 is required for Schwann cell myelination
CD9 is a tetraspanin highly expressed on Schwann cells
Von Willebrand factor is a canonical marker of vascular endothelial cells
Claudin 5 is a tight junction protein specific to vascular endothelium
DARC (ACKR1) is a chemokine receptor expressed on venular endothelial cells
EGFL7 is an endothelial-specific secreted factor
E-selectin is an adhesion molecule on activated endothelial cells
EPAS1 (HIF-2α) is highly expressed in endothelial cells
RAMP3 modulates adrenomedullin signaling in endothelial cells
Alpha smooth muscle actin is the canonical marker of smooth muscle cells
Smooth muscle myosin heavy chain is specific to differentiated smooth muscle cells
Desmin is an intermediate filament protein in smooth muscle cells
Calponin 1 is a smooth muscle-specific actin-binding protein
Transgelin (SM22) is a smooth muscle differentiation marker
Myosin light chain kinase is essential for smooth muscle contraction
Myosin regulatory light chain 9 is specific to smooth muscle cells
ALDH3A1 is a corneal crystallin and major soluble protein of corneal epithelium
Keratin 12 is corneal epithelium-specific
Collagen XVII marks basal epithelial cells at the basement membrane
Connexin 30 is expressed in corneal epithelial cells
NQO1 is a detoxification enzyme highly expressed in corneal epithelium
TGFBI (keratoepithelin) is a corneal epithelium-associated extracellular matrix protein
CXCL14 is expressed in corneal epithelial cells
High-affinity choline transporter marks cholinergic (starburst) amacrine cells
NKG7 is expressed in cytotoxic lymphocytes, but SLC5A7 context suggests cholinergic neurons
RBFOX1 is a neuronal RNA splicing factor expressed in retinal neurons
Cardiac actin is expressed in specific retinal neuron subtypes
Neuron-specific gene family member 2 marks neuronal identity
NrCAM is a neuronal cell adhesion molecule in retinal neurons
RIMS1 is a synaptic protein involved in neurotransmitter release
Myocilin is a hallmark marker of trabecular meshwork cells in the eye
WIF1 is a Wnt inhibitor expressed in trabecular meshwork and scleral cells
Complement factor D (adipsin) is expressed in trabecular meshwork/scleral fibroblasts
Endothelin 3 is expressed in ocular stromal cells
Decorin marks scleral/stromal fibroblasts
VCAM1 is expressed in trabecular meshwork cells and Schlemm's canal
Pleiotrophin is expressed in ocular stromal/mesenchymal cells
Alpha-crystallin A is the major lens structural protein
Beta-crystallin B2 is a lens fiber cell structural protein
Alpha-crystallin B is a lens chaperone protein
Aquaporin 1 is expressed in lens epithelial cells
CXCL14 is expressed in lens/corneal epithelial cells
CTGF is expressed in lens epithelial cells during development
Sarcolipin expression in lens cells distinguishes this cluster
Von Willebrand factor is a definitive endothelial cell marker
Claudin 5 is specific to vascular endothelial tight junctions
TM4SF1 is enriched in endothelial cells
EGFL7 is an endothelial-specific secreted factor
SPARCL1 is expressed in endothelial cells
Alpha-2-macroglobulin is expressed in choroidal/retinal endothelial cells
IFI27 is an interferon-stimulated gene highly expressed in endothelial cells
CPAMD8 is expressed in ciliary body non-pigmented epithelium
TRPM3 is an ion channel expressed in ciliary body epithelium
DAPL1 marks pigmented epithelial cells of the ciliary body
Collagen IX alpha 1 is expressed in vitreous-producing ciliary epithelium
PAX6 is expressed in ciliary body epithelium
Opticin is a vitreous humor proteoglycan produced by ciliary body epithelium
HSD17B2 is expressed in ciliary body epithelium
Long-wave opsin is the definitive marker of L/M-cone photoreceptors
Cone arrestin is specific to cone photoreceptors
Cone phosphodiesterase gamma subunit is specific to cone phototransduction
Guanylate cyclase activator 1C is expressed in cone photoreceptors
Transthyretin is expressed in cone photoreceptors and RPE
Keratin 13 marks non-keratinized stratified squamous epithelium (conjunctival)
Keratin 4 is expressed in mucosal stratified squamous epithelium
Aquaporin 5 is expressed in conjunctival goblet/epithelial cells
Keratin 19 marks conjunctival epithelial cells
SLPI is a protease inhibitor expressed in mucosal epithelial cells
Desmoglein 3 is a desmosomal cadherin in stratified squamous epithelium
S100A8 is expressed in activated/inflamed epithelial cells
Decorin is a proteoglycan marking stromal fibroblasts/keratocytes
Keratin 15 marks limbal basal epithelial stem cells
S100A2 is expressed in basal epithelial/limbal stem cells
Vimentin expression in epithelial context suggests limbal stem cells with mesenchymal features
IGFBP5 is expressed in limbal stromal/niche cells
SERPINE2 is expressed in limbal/corneal stromal cells
SPARCL1 is expressed in corneal stromal cells
